amendments: amendment_R1.md (sign-error defect repair; as-run results_asrun_R0/ INVALID)
finding: A-initial enrichment shows NO predictive paradigm under the M0-M6 battery: no stem/clitic/adaptor model beats the positional null (M2) after MDL charge on held-out unseen types (M3 11.6 vs M2 6.8 bits/sign); recurring-stem and alternant counts recorded in results/primary.json
design_disclosure: M3/M4/M6 mixture wastes lexicon mass on unseen stems by construction (LAM=0.5 fixed, untuned); the battery tests PREDICTION, and prediction is what a paradigm claim requires
wording: A remains: strongly enriched in initial position across overlapping segmentation variants. Nothing more.
